yoe_required: 1 year progressive HR or related field (MINIMUM). No explicit upper cap stated.
yoe_notes: Minimum 1 year — Jamie has ~3 years. Well within range. NOT a stretch on YOE.
sponsorship_note: No explicit 'no sponsorship' language in JD. Sponsorship status unknown — Jamie will answer Yes on form.
geography_check: Portland, OR on-site — in bounds (Portland metro is primary target).
jd_summary: HR Generalist supporting all HR functions at a designated site (warehouse/logistics/cold storage). Key duties: partner with site leaders, talent acquisition support (CoE partnership), pay changes/total rewards, ER investigations, compliance (labor law, CBAs), HRIS data accuracy, payroll/benefits processing, HR policy implementation. Very operations-focused, high-volume site HR. Minimum bar is 1 yr HR experience + MS Office proficiency.
fit_notes: Good fit for Jamie's HR background. ODN (leave-cost/policy redesign), Vestas (ER, M&A, onboarding, HRBP support), Kronos (HR generalist functions: recruiting, compensation, performance). NextGen covers data/analytics side. The compliance/CBA angle is a mild gap — she has no CBA experience — but not a hard disqualifier at this level. Portland on-site is ideal geography.
